title: Dashboard KPI and Chart Accuracy
description: Verify that the dashboard displays correct KPIs and charts reflecting live farm data including cost trends, plan status distribution, and activity metrics.

steps.description: Login with valid credentials and select a farm with known data.
Navigate to the Dashboard page.
Check that KPI cards display accurate values matching backend data.
Verify charts for cost trends, plan status distribution, and activities render correctly and values match expected statistics.

title: Daily Log Creation Online
description: Verify that daily agricultural activities can be correctly logged in online mode including task selection, team and material tracking.

steps.description: Login successfully and navigate to the DailyLog page.
Create a new daily log entry with valid farm, date, tasks, and add team members and materials.
Submit the daily log while online.
Verify the daily log is saved successfully and appears in activity feed and backend data store.

title: Daily Log Creation Offline and Synchronization
description: Verify that a daily agricultural activity log can be created offline and is queued properly, then synchronizes automatically when online.

steps.description: Set application to offline mode (disable network).
Create a new daily log entry with valid data including tasks, team, and materials.
Save the daily log, confirming it is queued locally.
Verify the UI indicates the log is queued and stored in offline queue.
Restore network connectivity.
Verify the queued daily log is automatically synchronized to backend and removed from queue.

title: Tree Inventory Event Logging
description: Verify tree inventory can be filtered, updated, and event logs added for planting, harvest, loss, and adjustments.

steps.description: Login and navigate to Tree Inventory page.
Apply filters for tree statuses (productive, declining) and verify displayed counts and summaries update accordingly.
Select a tree batch and add event logs such as planting, harvest, loss, and stock adjustments.
Confirm event logs are saved and reflected in inventory counts and history.

title: Crop Management Task and Product Linking
description: Verify crop plans and tasks can be managed including adding tasks and linking associated products/services.

steps.description: Navigate to Crop Plans and select a crop card.
Add a new task to the crop plan with valid details.
Link relevant products or services to the newly created task.
Verify tasks and linked products appear correctly in crop details and backend data.

title: Sales Invoice Creation and Tracking
description: Verify agricultural product sales invoices can be created, saved, and tracked in the sales module.

steps.description: Navigate to Sales page.
Create a new sales invoice with valid customer info, products, quantities, prices, and discounts.
Save the invoice and verify it appears in the invoice table with correct totals.
Confirm invoice data persists and can be updated or marked as paid.

title: Inventory Stock Movement and Reorder Alerts
description: Verify stock movements can be recorded and reorder alerts trigger correctly when stock levels fall below thresholds.

steps.description: Navigate to Stock Management page.
Record stock additions and removals for various materials.
Ensure stock levels update correctly after movements.
Reduce stock below reorder threshold for a material.
Verify that reorder alert notification is displayed for that material.

title: User Authentication and Role-Based Farm Access Control
description: Verify secure user login with correct credential validation and farm-specific access permissions enforced with Row Level Security.

steps.description: Attempt login with valid user credentials.
Confirm login succeeds and user can view only farms assigned to their memberships.
Attempt login with invalid credentials.
Confirm login fails with appropriate error message.
Attempt data access for a farm outside user's permissions.
Confirm access is denied and no data leakage occurs due to RLS enforcement.

title: Financial Risk Zone Anomaly Detection
description: Verify that the Financial Risk Zone analytics module identifies cost anomalies with correct statistical calculations and flags outliers.

steps.description: Navigate to Reports page and access Financial Risk Zone analytics.
Generate report with filters that include known cost anomalies.
Verify anomalies are flagged and statistical calculations are accurate.

title: API Endpoint Authentication and Error Handling
description: Verify backend API endpoints enforce authentication and return proper error codes and messages when requests are unauthorized or malformed.

steps.description: Make API requests to backend with valid authentication tokens for allowed operations.
Confirm API returns expected data with success status.
Make API requests without authentication or with invalid tokens.
Verify API returns 401 Unauthorized or 403 Forbidden as appropriate.
Make API requests with invalid payloads or missing required data.
Verify API returns 400 Bad Request with descriptive error messages.

title: Offline Queue Persistence and Retry Mechanism
description: Verify offline queued requests and associated data persist in IndexedDB and service workers retry synchronization with backend when connectivity is restored.

steps.description: Put app offline and create multiple daily logs and stock movement entries.
Confirm requests are saved in offline queue storage.
Reload the application and confirm queued requests persist.
Restore network connectivity.
Verify queued requests are retried automatically and synchronized success is confirmed in UI.

title: Database Migrations and RLS Policy Application
description: Verify all database migrations including Row Level Security policy scripts (0093, 0094) apply cleanly without errors in test and staging environments.

steps.description: Run migration scripts sequentially on a fresh database.
Check each migration completes without error and schema matches expected definitions.
Validate that Row Level Security policies are effectively applied by attempting unauthorized data access.
Confirm unauthorized access is blocked as per RLS rules.

title: Reporting and Export to Excel Functionality
description: Verify that reports can be generated with filters and exported to Excel format correctly, preserving data integrity and formatting.

steps.description: Navigate to Reports page and apply various filter criteria.
Generate report based on selected filters.
Verify report data matches expected filtered data.
Export the generated report to Excel.
Confirm exported Excel file downloads correctly and contains accurate, well-formatted data.

title: User Interface Flow and Responsiveness
description: Verify all user interface flows including navigation, forms, and data displays conform to documented wireframes and are responsive on desktop and mobile devices.

steps.description: Test user navigation from login through dashboard, daily logs, crop management, tree inventory, sales, and reports on desktop.
Confirm UI flows match wireframe design and no UI glitches occur.
Repeat tests above on multiple mobile device viewports.
Verify all pages render correctly and interactive elements respond well on mobile.

title: System Deployment and Production Readiness Checks
description: Verify deployment steps perform clean setup including environment variables, secrets management, migrations, static file collection, and security hardening.

steps.description: Perform a fresh deployment following documented deployment procedure.
Check all environment variables and secrets are correctly loaded.
Verify database migrations run successfully.
Confirm static assets are collected and served correctly.
Validate security checks including authentication, role enforcement, and RLS policies are operational.
